## What's Changed

- Simplified server login to a password-only Tater Tube flow with a persistent browser session.
- Removed legacy JWT environment setup, proxy configuration, appearance switching, and updater controls from the web UI.
- Reworked Configuration so Processing groups Hardware Transcoding, NZB Processing, Streaming, and Stream Metadata together.
- Improved the dashboard with clearer active player and active stream information, including local playback and hardware transcode status.
- Cleaned up the sidebar status panel with compact version, queue, hardware, and streamer status.
- Removed queue category clutter and fixed local stream progress reporting so transcoded streams show playback time instead of misleading byte totals.
- Removed unused proxy/client code and legacy processing strategy controls for a smaller server configuration surface.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```

Keep your existing `/config`, media folder, cache, and hardware device mappings. If you have not already mapped hardware devices for transcoding, keep `/dev/dri` mapped for Intel/VAAPI/QSV hosts.
